data.general: This period will bring opportunities for growth and expansion in your career, but you must be prepared to take calculated risks. Be cautious of overconfidence and maintain a balance between your professional and personal life.
data.luck: Your luck will be influenced by the transiting Jupiter in the 10th house, indicating a fortunate period for career advancements. However, the transiting Saturn in the 7th house may cause some challenges in personal relationships.
data.scope: The current transits suggest that your career and public image will be in focus. Be prepared to take on new responsibilities and showcase your skills to the world.
data.study: The transiting Mercury in the 9th house indicates a favorable period for learning and higher studies. You may also receive opportunities for travel and cultural exchange.
data.love: The current transits suggest that your personal relationships may face some challenges due to the transiting Saturn in the 7th house. However, the transiting Venus in the 10th house may indicate a fortunate period for romance and partnerships.
data.travel: The transiting Jupiter in the 10th house may indicate opportunities for travel and cultural exchange related to your career or higher studies.
